Explanation:
Counting occurrences in the builder column shows:
- Hawthorn Leslie: 21 entries (rows 6, 19–38)
- Peckett: 17 entries (rows 39–48, 56–62)
- Andrew Barclay: 16 entries (rows 11–18, 52–55, 64–67)
- Manning Wardle: 5 entries (rows 1–5)
- Bagnall: 3 entries (rows 9, 10, 49)
- Hudswell Clarke: 2 entries (rows 8, 50)
- Vulcan Foundry: 1 entry (row 7)
- Robert Stephenson & Hawthorn: 1 entry (row 51)
- Hunslet: 1 entry (row 63)

Hawthorn Leslie has the highest count, so the prediction is correct.
